/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libmock_socket.so -o /home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/xmlrpcpp/lib/libmock_socket.so CMakeFiles/mock_socket.dir/mock_socket.cpp.o   -L/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib  -L/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/xmlrpcpp/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib:/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/xmlrpcpp/gtest:/home/mu/IVG/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/xmlrpcpp/gtest/lib ../gtest/lib/libgtest.so.1.11.0
